name: Quick and Tasty Chicken Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Simmer the first seven ingredients in a pot for about 10 minutes.
2. Make a paste by mixing arrowroot with 1 tablespoon water.
3. Add the paste to the soup and cook until smooth (this should take just a few seconds).
4. Serve and enjoy!
Food Exchange per serving: 2 3/4 Lean Meat Exchanges
Calories: 185
